response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-adjacent tools, and deep technical breadth across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or advanced degrees in AI — key requirements for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at Stripe
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive through multiple open-source platforms and startups
Extensive cross-stack engineering fluency with cloud-native tools (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: No clear evidence of leading AI-powered product strategy or cloud platform roadmaps
Lacks advanced degree in AI or machine learning; education is BS in CS only
Minimal documentation of direct AI/ML model development or large-scale AI platform deployment
